Join `dim_geography` to `fact_cereals_major` and `fact_cereals_minor` on `geography_id` and `year_id` (via `dim_year`). Order results by `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_yield_kg_per_ha` DESC.

question: १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी भरपूर मका उत्पादन नोंदवले होते, परंतु त्यांच्याकडे गहू उत्पादनाची कोणतीही नोंद नव्हती?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 0 AND (T3.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA IS NULL OR T3.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA = 0) GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Find `dim_geography.dist_name` for `dim_year.year` = 1970 where `fact_cereals_minor.maize_production_1000tons` > 0 and (`fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons` IS NULL OR `fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons` = 0). Join `dim_geography` and `dim_year` to `fact_cereals_minor` on `geography_id` and `year_id`, and left join `fact_cereals_major` on `fact_cereals_minor.geography_id` = `fact_cereals_major.geography_id` and `fact_cereals_minor.year_id` = `fact_cereals_major.year_id`.

question: १९७० साली ज्वारी पिकवलेले पण गहू पिकवले नसलेल्या जिल्ह्यांची नावे वर्णक्रमानुसार सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 0 AND T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID NOT IN ( SELECT T5.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T5 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T6 ON T5.YEAR_ID = T6.YEAR_ID WHERE T6.YEAR = '1970' AND T5.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 0 ) GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Retrieve `dim_geography.dist_name` for `dim_year.year` = 1970 where (`fact_sorghum.kharif_sorghum_area_1000ha` > 0 OR `fact_sorghum.rabi_sorghum_area_1000ha` > 0) AND (`fact_cereals_major.wheat_area_1000ha` = 0 OR `fact_cereals_major.wheat_area_1000ha` IS NULL). Join `dim_geography` to `fact_sorghum` and `fact_cereals_major` on `geography_id`, and join both fact tables to `dim_year` on `year_id`. Order by `dim_geography.dist_name`.

question:

१९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी ८४१.२७ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त भात उत्पन्न मिळवले तर त्या जिल्ह्यांनी मका पिकासाठी २,८०० हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त क्षेत्र वाटप केले होते?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 AND T3.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA > 2.8

question: १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी ८४१.२७ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त भात उत्पन्न मिळवले तर त्याचवेळी २,८०० हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त मका लागवडही राखली?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 AND T3.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA > 2.8
evidence: Find `dim_geography.dist_name` where for `dim_year.year` = 1970, `fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 841.27 and `fact_cereals_minor.maize_area_1000ha` > 2.8. Join `fact_cereals_major` and `fact_cereals_minor` on `geography_id` and `year_id` (both referencing `dim_geography` and `dim_year`).

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
१९७० मध्ये, ज्या जिल्ह्यांनी ३३७.५९ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त भात उत्पादन आणि २,५०० हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त मका लागवड क्षेत्र नोंदवले आहे, अशा जिल्ह्यांची नावे वर्णक्रमानुसार सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID AND T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T3.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA > 2.5 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_geography.dist_name` where `dim_year.year` = 1970, `fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 337.59, and `fact_cereals_minor.maize_area_1000ha` > 2.5. Join `dim_geography` with `fact_cereals_major` and `fact_cereals_minor` on `geography_id`, and join with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Order by `dim_geography.dist_name`.

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
१९७० साली तांदूळ किंवा मका यापैकी कोणत्याही एका पिकासाठी ३३७.५९ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त उत्पन्न मिळवलेले जिल्हे आणि त्यांचे संबंधित राज्य ओळखा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T4 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T4.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 OR T4.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59);
evidence: Find districts (`dim_geography.dist_name`) and their states (`dim_geography.state_name`) where for year 1970 (`dim_year.year` = 1970) either rice yield (`fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha`) > 337.59 or maize yield (`fact_cereals_minor.maize_yield_kg_per_ha`) > 337.59. Join `fact_cereals_major` and `fact_cereals_minor` separately with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`, then combine results (UNION) to avoid duplicates.

question:
या क्वेरीचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
१९७० या वर्षात एकतर भात किंवा मका यांच्या उत्पादनात ८०० किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त उत्पादन नोंदवलेल्या जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि त्यांचे संबंधित राज्य यांची यादी करा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T4 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T4.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 800 OR T4.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 800) ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME
evidence: Find districts and their states where, in year 1970 (`dim_year`.`year` = 1970), either rice yield > 800 (`fact_cereals_major`.`rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 800) OR maize yield > 800 (`fact_cereals_minor`.`maize_yield_kg_per_ha` > 800). Output `dim_geography`.`dist_name` and `dim_geography`.`state_name`. Join `fact_cereals_major` and `fact_cereals_minor` separately to `dim_geography` and `dim_year`.

question:

१९७० या वर्षात तांदूळ किंवा मका यापैकी कोणत्याही एका पिकासाठी ८४१.२७ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त उत्पन्न मिळवलेले जिल्हे आणि त्यांचे संबंधित राज्य ओळखा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID LEFT JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID AND T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID LEFT JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T4 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T4.GEOGRAPHY_ID AND T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.YEAR = '1970' AND (T3.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 OR T4.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27)
evidence: Find `dim_geography.dist_name` and `dim_geography.state_name` for districts where, in year 1970 (`dim_year.year`=1970), either `fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 841.27 or `fact_cereals_minor.maize_yield_kg_per_ha` > 841.27. Join `dim_geography` with `fact_cereals_major` and `fact_cereals_minor` via `geography_id`, and join `dim_year` via `year_id` to filter by year.

question: छत्तीसगढ राज्यातील तांदूळ आणि गहू उत्पादन आणि उत्पादन आकडेवारीचा कालक्रमानुसार आढावा द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T1.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T1.YEAR_ID
evidence: Query must return `dim_year`.`year`, `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_area_1000ha`, `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons`, `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_area_1000ha`, `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_production_1000tons` for `dim_geography`.`state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh', ordered chronologically by `dim_year`.`year` ascending. Join `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: छत्तीसगढ़ातील सर्व जिल्ह्यांसाठी तांदूळ आणि गहू उत्पादन आणि उत्पादन आकडेवारीचा कालक्रमानुसार अहवाल द्या.
sql: SELECT T2.YEAR, T1.DIST_NAME, T0.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T0.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR T0 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR T2 ON T0.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T2.YEAR ASC
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh'. For each district (`dim_geography.dist_name`) and year (`dim_year.year`), get rice production (`fact_cereals_major.rice_production_1000tons`), rice yield (`fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha`), wheat production (`fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons`), and wheat yield (`fact_cereals_major.wheat_yield_kg_per_ha`). Order results chronologically by year.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील ज्या जिल्ह्यांमध्ये तांदूळ उत्पादन १,८५,००० टनांपेक्षा जास्त आहे, त्या जिल्ह्यांसाठी तांदूळ आणि गहू उत्पादन आणि उत्पादनाचे वार्षिक तपशील वर्ष आणि जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार क्रमवारीत प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, AVG(T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), AVG(T1.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 185.0 ORDER BY T3.YEAR DESC, T2.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter records where `dim_geography`.`state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons` > 185. For those districts, select `dim_year`.`year`, `dim_geography`.`dist_name`, `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons`, and `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_production_1000tons`. Order results by `dim_year`.`year` ascending, then `dim_geography`.`dist_name` ascending.

question: भिन्न राज्यांमध्ये तांदूळ आणि गहू यांची सरासरी उत्पादने प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME
evidence: Calculate AVG(fact_cereals_major.rice_production_1000tons) and AVG(fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons) grouped by dim_geography.state_name, joining fact_cereals_major and dim_geography on geography_id.

question: प्रत्येक राज्यासाठी तांदूळ आणि गहू यांची सरासरी उत्पादने वर्णक्रमानुसार सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME
evidence: For each state (`dim_geography.state_name`), compute the average rice production (`fact_cereals_major.rice_production_1000tons`) and average wheat production (`fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons`). Group by state and order alphabetically by state name.

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
सर्व राज्यांची सरासरी भात उत्पादनानुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने रँक करा, प्रत्येकाची सरासरी गहू उत्पादन देखील दर्शवा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T3.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T3.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.YEAR) >= 1 ORDER BY AVG(T3.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
evidence: Rank all states from `dim_geography`.`state_name` in descending order by the average of `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons`, and also show the average of `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_production_1000tons` for each state. Group by `dim_geography`.`state_name` after joining `dim_geography` and `fact_cereals_major` on `geography_id`. Order by average rice production DESC.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० साली कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी ३३७.५९ किलो प्रति हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त भात उत्पादन प्राप्त केले?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T3.YEAR = '1970'
evidence: Find districts (`dim_geography.dist_name`) in Chhattisgarh (`dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh') for year 1970 (`dim_year.year` = '1970') where rice yield (`dominion`.`fact_cereals_major`.`rice_yield_kg_per_ha`) is greater than 337.59.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० साली कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी दर हेक्टर ८०० किलोपेक्षा जास्त भात उत्पन्न मिळवले?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 800.0
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970, join `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `fact_cereals_major.geography_id` = `dim_geography.geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `fact_cereals_major.year_id` = `dim_year.year_id`, select `dim_geography.dist_name` where `fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 800.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांमध्ये सरासरी धान उत्पादन ३३७.५९ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त होते? कृपया त्यांच्या उत्पादनाच्या उतरत्या क्रमाने यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T3.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T3.DIST_NAME HAVING AVG(T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 337.59 ORDER BY AVG(T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
evidence: Select `dim_geography`.`dist_name` and `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons` where `dim_geography`.`state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year`.`year` = 1970 and `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 337.59, joining `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`, order by `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons` DESC.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांची सरासरी गहू उत्पादनानुसार उच्च ते निम्न क्रमाने यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh'. Join `dim_geography` with `fact_cereals_major` on `geography_id`. Group by `dim_geography.dist_name`. Compute AVG(`fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons`) as average_wheat_production. Order by average_wheat_production DESC.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांची सरासरी गहू उत्पादनानुसार उच्च ते निम्न क्रमाने रँक करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh'. Join `dim_geography` with `fact_cereals_major` on `geography_id`. Group by `dim_geography.dist_name`. Compute AVG(`fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons`) as average_wheat_production. Order by average_wheat_production DESC.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांची सरासरी गहू उत्पादनानुसार उच्चतम ते निम्नतम क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh'. Join `dim_geography` with `fact_cereals_major` on `geography_id`. Group by `dim_geography.dist_name`. Compute AVG(`fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons`) as average_wheat_production. Order by average_wheat_production DESC.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या पाच जिल्ह्यांमध्ये भाताचे सर्वाधिक उत्पादन झाले होते?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: Join `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Filter where `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. Select `dim_geography.dist_name` and `fact_cereals_major.rice_production_1000tons`. Order by `fact_cereals_major.rice_production_1000tons` DESC and limit to 5.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील १९७० साली सर्वाधिक धान उत्पादन असलेल्या शीर्ष पाच जिल्ह्यांची यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970, join `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` and `dim_year`, select `dim_geography.dist_name` and `fact_cereals_major.rice_production_1000tons`, order by `fact_cereals_major.rice_production_1000tons` DESC, limit 5.

question: चत्तीसगडमध्ये १९७० मध्ये नोंदवलेल्या सर्वोच्च सरासरी धान्य उत्पादनाच्या शीर्ष ५ जिल्ह्यांची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T3.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T3.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: Find districts in Chhattisgarh for year 1970. Compute total grain production per district as sum of `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons`, `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_production_1000tons`, `fact_cereals_minor`.`maize_production_1000tons`, and `fact_cereals_minor`.`barley_production_1000tons`. Return top 5 districts by total production descending.

question: १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी आणि राज्यांनी ८४१.२७ किलो प्रति हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त भाताची उत्पादकता मिळवली?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 AND T3.YEAR = '1970';
evidence: Find `dim_geography.dist_name` and `dim_geography.state_name` where `dim_year.year` = 1970 and `fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 841.27. Join `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
१९७० मध्ये प्रति हेक्टर ३३७.५९ किलोग्रामपेक्षा जास्त तांदूळ उत्पादन मिळवलेल्या जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि त्यांच्या संबंधित राज्यांची यादी, जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमाने द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter `fact_cereals_major` where `dim_year`.`year` = 1970 and `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 337.59, join with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and `dim_year` on `year_id`, then select `dim_geography`.`dist_name` and `dim_geography`.`state_name`, ordered by `dim_geography`.`dist_name` ASC.

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
१९७० या वर्षात ३३७.५९ किलो प्रति हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त सरासरी भात उत्पादन मिळवलेल्या जिल्ह्यांची आणि त्यांच्या संबंधित राज्यांची यादी करा, राज्यांच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमाने मांडा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME HAVING AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 337.59 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_geography.dist_name` and `dim_geography.state_name` where `dim_year.year` = 1970 and `fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 337.59, ordered by `dim_geography.state_name`.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी १९७० साली ८४१.२७ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त धान उत्पादन आणि ४५४.५५ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त गहू उत्पादन मिळवले?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 AND T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 454.55
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. From `fact_cereals_major`, select records where `fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 841.27 and `fact_cereals_major.wheat_yield_kg_per_ha` > 454.55. Return `dim_geography.dist_name`.

question:
खालील प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
१९७० साली तांदूळ आणि गहू या दोन्ही पिकांसाठी ३३७.५९ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त उत्पन्न मिळवणाऱ्या छत्तीसगढ राज्यातील जिल्ह्यांची यादी, वर्णक्रमानुसार द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Find districts (`dim_geography`.`dist_name`) where `dim_geography`.`state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year`.`year` = 1970 and `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 337.59 and `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_yield_kg_per_ha` > 337.59, joining `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Order results by `dim_geography`.`dist_name` alphabetically.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० साली भाताचे ३३७.५९ किलो/हेक्टर आणि गव्हाचे ४५४.५५ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त कमाल उत्पन्न कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी मिळवले? कृपया त्यांची नावे वर्णक्रमानुसार सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME HAVING MAX(T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 337.59 AND MAX(T1.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 454.55 ORDER BY T2.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Find district names (`dim_geography.dist_name`) where `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970 and `fact_cereals_major.rice_yield_kg_per_ha` > 337.59 and `fact_cereals_major.wheat_yield_kg_per_ha` > 454.55. Join `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Order results by `dim_geography.dist_name` alphabetically.

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
५,००,००० टनांपेक्षा जास्त तांदूळ किंवा गहू उत्पादन करणारे जिल्हे ओळखा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T0 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T0.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 500 OR T0.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 500;
evidence: Find distinct `dim_geography`.`dist_name` where `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons` > 500 OR `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_production_1000tons` > 500, joining `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id`.

question: ४,००,८०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त तांदूळ किंवा २६,५०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त गहू उत्पादन करणारे जिल्हे ओळखा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 400.8 OR T2.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 26.5
evidence: Find distinct `dim_geography.dist_name` where `fact_cereals_major.rice_production_1000tons` > 400.8 OR `fact_cereals_major.wheat_production_1000tons` > 26.5, joining `fact_cereals_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id`.

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
त्या जिल्ह्यांची ओळख करा ज्यांनी ४००,८०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त भात उत्पादन किंवा २६,५०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त गहू उत्पादन नोंदवले आहे, आणि ज्यांच्या या धान्यांचे एकूण उत्पादन १८५,००० टनांपेक्षा अधिक आहे.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 400.8 OR T2.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 26.5 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS + T2.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 185.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Find districts (`dim_geography`.`dist_name`) where either `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons` > 400.8 (meaning > 400,800 tons) OR `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_production_1000tons` > 26.5 (meaning > 26,500 tons), and the sum of `fact_cereals_major`.`rice_production_1000tons` + `fact_cereals_major`.`wheat_production_1000tons` > 185.0 (meaning > 185,000 tons). Aggregate by district across all years.

question: छत्तीसगढच्या दुर्ग जिल्ह्यातील १९७० साली बाजरीच्या पिकाचे क्षेत्रफळ आणि उत्पादन आकडे पुरवा.
sql: SELECT T1.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA, T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.DIST_NAME = 'Durg' AND T3.YEAR = '1970'
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_geography.dist_name` = 'Durg', join with `dim_year` where `dim_year.year` = 1970, then select `fact_millets.pearl_millet_area_1000ha` and `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`.

question: १९७० साठी, छत्तीसगढमधील बाजरीच्या लागवडीचे क्षेत्रफळ आणि उत्पादनाची एकूण माहिती, लागवडीच्या क्षेत्रफळाच्या आकारानुसार क्रमवारीत प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T1.DIST_NAME, T2.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA, T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA
evidence: Retrieve `dim_geography`.`dist_name`, `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_area_1000ha`, `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_production_1000tons` for year 1970 and state 'Chhattisgarh'. Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Filter where `dim_year`.`year` = 1970 and `dim_geography`.`state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh'. Sort results by `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_area_1000ha` in descending order.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० साली बाजरीचे एकूण क्षेत्रफळ आणि उत्पादन यांचे जिल्हावार तपशील, उत्पादनाच्या प्रमाणानुसार क्रमवारी लावून द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME, SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA) >= 0.0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) DESC
evidence: Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Filter where `dim_geography`.`state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year`.`year` = 1970. Select `dim_geography`.`dist_name`, `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_area_1000ha`, `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_production_1000tons`. Order by `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_production_1000tons` DESC.

question: १९६६ ते १९७० या कालावधीत बाजरी आणि नाचणी या दोन्ही धान्यांच्या सरासरी उत्पादन आणि एकूण उत्पादनाचा राज्यनिहाय सारांश द्या.
sql: SELECT AVG(T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), AVG(T1.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), T2.STATE_NAME FROM FACT_MILLETS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME
evidence: Select state-wise (`dim_geography`.`state_name`) total production (SUM) and average production (AVG) for `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_production_1000tons` (bajra) and `fact_millets`.`finger_millet_production_1000tons` (nachani) for years 1966 to 1970 (`dim_year`.`year` between 1966 and 1970). Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: १९६६ ते १९७० या कालावधीत बाजरी आणि नाचणी या धान्यांच्या सरासरी उत्पादनाचा आणि एकूण उत्पादनाचा राज्यनिहाय सारांश प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, AVG(T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T1.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), SUM(T1.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME
evidence: For years 1966 to 1970 in `dim_year`.`year`, join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `fact_millets`.`geography_id` = `dim_geography`.`geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `fact_millets`.`year_id` = `dim_year`.`year_id`. Group by `dim_geography`.`state_name`. For each state, calculate the average and sum of `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_production_1000tons` and `fact_millets`.`finger_millet_production_1000tons`.

question: १९६६ ते १९७० या कालावधीत बाजरी आणि नाचणी यांच्या सरासरी उत्पादनाची आणि एकूण उत्पादनाची राज्यनिहाय सारांश प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, AVG(T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T1.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), SUM(T1.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.MILLET_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `fact_millets.geography_id` = `dim_geography.geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `fact_millets.year_id` = `dim_year.year_id`. Filter where `dim_year.year` between 1966 and 1970. Group by `dim_geography.state_name`. For each state, compute AVG(`fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`) as avg_pearl_millet_production, SUM(`fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`) as total_pearl_millet_production, AVG(`fact_millets.finger_millet_production_1000tons`) as avg_finger_millet_production, SUM(`fact_millets.finger_millet_production_1000tons`) as total_finger_millet_production.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांची १९७० सालच्या बाजरी उत्पादनानुसार उच्च ते निम्न क्रमाने रँक करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. Join `dim_geography`, `dim_year`, and `fact_millets`. Select `dim_geography.dist_name` and `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`. Order by `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` DESC.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्हे त्यांच्या १९७० च्या बाजरी उत्पादनानुसार उच्च ते निम्न क्रमाने सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC
evidence: List `dim_geography.dist_name` for districts where `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh', join with `fact_millets` on `fact_millets.geography_id` = `dim_geography.geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `fact_millets.year_id` = `dim_year.year_id` where `dim_year.year` = 1970, order by `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` descending.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांची १९७० सालच्या सरासरी बाजरी उत्पादनाच्या आधारे उच्च ते निम्न क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING AVG(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) >= 0.0 ORDER BY AVG(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. Join `dim_geography`, `dim_year`, and `fact_millets`. For each district (`dim_geography.dist_name`), get `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`. Order districts by production descending.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील १९७० मध्ये सर्वाधिक बाजरी उत्पादन असलेल्या १० जिल्ह्यांची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `fact_millets.geography_id` = `dim_geography.geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `fact_millets.year_id` = `dim_year.year_id`. Select `dim_geography.dist_name` and `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`. Order by `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` DESC limit 10.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० मध्ये सर्वाधिक बाजरी उत्पादन असलेल्या शीर्ष १० जिल्ह्यांची यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. Join `dim_geography`, `dim_year`, and `fact_millets` on geography_id and year_id. Select `dim_geography.dist_name` and `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`. Order by `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` DESC, limit 10.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० मध्ये सर्वाधिक बाजरी उत्पादन असलेल्या शीर्ष १० जिल्ह्यांची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Select `dim_geography.dist_name` and `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`. Order by `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` descending and limit to 10.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांसाठी १९६६ ते १९७० दरम्यान बाजरीची उत्पादने प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970'
evidence: Query pearl millet production (`fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_production_1000tons`) for districts (`dim_geography`.`dist_name`) in the state Chhattisgarh (`dim_geography`.`state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh') for years 1966 to 1970 inclusive (`dim_year`.`year` between 1966 and 1970). Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांसाठी १९६६ ते १९७० दरम्यान बाजरीची उत्पादने कालक्रमानुसार द्या.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' ORDER BY T3.YEAR
evidence: Join `dim_geography`, `dim_year`, and `fact_millets`. Filter where `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` between 1966 and 1970. Select `dim_geography.dist_name`, `dim_year.year`, and `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`. Order by `dim_year.year` (chronological) and `dim_geography.dist_name`.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांसाठी १९६६ ते १९७० या कालावधीतील बाजरी उत्पादनाचे वार्षिक तपशील, कालक्रमानुसार मांडा, ज्यामध्ये सर्वोच्च उत्पादन असलेले जिल्हे प्रथम दाखवा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR, SUM(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR HAVING SUM(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) >= 0.0 ORDER BY T2.YEAR ASC, SUM(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` between 1966 and 1970. Select `dim_year.year`, `dim_geography.dist_name`, `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons`. Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Order by `dim_year.year` ASC, `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` DESC.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्हे सूचीबद्ध करा ज्यांनी १९७० या वर्षात नक्की ५०० टन नाचणी आणि किमान काही बाजरी उत्पादन केले होते, वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS >= 0.0 AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS = 0.2 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. Join `dim_geography` with `fact_millets` on `geography_id`, and `fact_millets` with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Select `dim_geography.dist_name` where `fact_millets.finger_millet_production_1000tons` = 0.5 and `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` > 0. Sort by `dim_geography.dist_name` ASC.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील ज्या जिल्ह्यांमध्ये १९७० मध्ये बाजरी उत्पादन नोंदवले गेले होते, परंतु ज्यांमध्ये नागली उत्पादन २०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त होण्याची कोणतीही नोंद नाही, ते जिल्हे ओळखा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS >= 0.0 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 THEN 1 END) = 0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Find districts (`dim_geography.dist_name`) in Chhattisgarh (`dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh') for the year 1970 (`dim_year.year` = 1970) where pearl millet production was recorded (`fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` > 0) but there is no record of finger millet production exceeding 200 tons (i.e., `fact_millets.finger_millet_production_1000tons` IS NULL OR `fact_millets.finger_millet_production_1000tons` ≤ 0.2). Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी बाजरी आणि २०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त नाचणी उत्पादन केली?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0 AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2
evidence: Find districts (`dim_geography`.`dist_name`) from `fact_millets` joined with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and `dim_year` on `year_id` where `dim_year`.`year` = 1970, `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_production_1000tons` > 0 (or non-null), and `fact_millets`.`finger_millet_production_1000tons` > 0.2 (since 200 tons = 0.2 thousand tons).

question: १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी बाजरी आणि २०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त नाचणी पिकवली होती? कृपया त्यांची नावे वर्णक्रमानुसार सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0 AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Find districts where in year 1970 (`dim_year`.`year` = 1970), pearl millet was grown (`fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_area_1000ha` > 0 or `fact_millets`.`pearl_millet_production_1000tons` > 0) and finger millet production exceeded 200 tons (`fact_millets`.`finger_millet_production_1000tons` > 200). Return `dim_geography`.`dist_name` sorted alphabetically. Join `fact_millets` with `dim_year` on `year_id` and with `dim_geography` on `geography_id`.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी २०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त नाचणी किंवा बाजरी उत्पादन केले?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 UNION SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. From `fact_millets`, select districts (`dim_geography.dist_name`) where `fact_millets.finger_millet_production_1000tons` > 0.2 OR `fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` > 0.2. Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी २०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त नाचणी किंवा बाजरी उत्पादन केले होते?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 UNION SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2
evidence: Find `dim_geography.dist_name` where `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970 and (`fact_millets.pearl_millet_production_1000tons` > 0.2 OR `fact_millets.finger_millet_production_1000tons` > 0.2). Join `fact_millets` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी २०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त नाचणी किंवा बाजरी उत्पादन केले होते?

हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
१९७० पासून त्यांच्या सरासरी चण्याच्या उत्पादनानुसार जिल्हे आणि राज्यांची श्रेणी द्या, त्या वर्षासाठी सरासरी तूरड्याचे उत्पादनही दर्शवा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
evidence: For years >= 1970 (`dim_year`.`year` >= 1970), compute average chickpea production (`fact_pulses_major`.`chickpea_production_1000tons`) and average pigeonpea production (`fact_pulses_major`.`pigeonpea_production_1000tons`) grouped by district (`dim_geography`.`dist_name`) and state (`dim_geography`.`state_name`). Rank results by average chickpea production descending.

question: छत्तीसगढमध्ये १९७० साली कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी १५,००० टनांपेक्षा जास्त चणे पिकवले, परंतु ३५,२०० टनांपेक्षा जास्त तूर पिकवली नाही?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 15.0 AND NOT SUM(T3.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 35.2
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh' and `dim_year.year` = 1970. Then select `dim_geography.dist_name` where `fact_pulses_major.chickpea_production_1000tons` > 15.0 and `fact_pulses_major.pigeonpea_production_1000tons` <= 35.2. Join `fact_pulses_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी २३,००० टनांपेक्षा जास्त चणे आणि १५,००० टनांपेक्षा जास्त तूर उत्पादन केले?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 23.0 AND T2.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 15.0
evidence: Find `dim_geography`.`dist_name` where `dim_year`.`year` = 1970, `fact_pulses_major`.`chickpea_production_1000tons` > 23, and `fact_pulses_major`.`pigeonpea_production_1000tons` > 15, joining `fact_pulses_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: १९७० मध्ये कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी २३,००० टनांपेक्षा जास्त चणे आणि १५,००० टनांपेक्षा जास्त तूर उत्पादित केली?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 23.0 AND T2.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 15.0
evidence: Find `dim_geography.dist_name` for records where `dim_year.year` = 1970, `fact_pulses_major.chickpea_production_1000tons` > 23.0, and `fact_pulses_major.pigeonpea_production_1000tons` > 15.0. Join `fact_pulses_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: १९७० मध्ये १५,००० टनांपेक्षा जास्त चणा आणि तूर दोन्हीचे उत्पादन करणारे जिल्हे ओळखा, त्यांची यादी वर्णक्रमानुसार द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 15.0 AND SUM(T2.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 15.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Find districts where in year 1970 (`dim_year.year` = 1970) both chickpea production (`fact_pulses_major.chickpea_production_1000tons` > 15.0) and pigeonpea production (`fact_pulses_major.pigeonpea_production_1000tons` > 15.0). Join `fact_pulses_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Select `dim_geography.dist_name` and order alphabetically by `dim_geography.dist_name` ASC.

question: १९७० साली, कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी चण्यासाठी ४४८.३४ किलो/हेक्टर किंवा तूरसाठी ७८४.३१ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त उत्पन्न नोंदवले?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 448.34 OR T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 784.31)
evidence: Find districts (`dim_geography`.`dist_name`) where `dim_year`.`year` = 1970 and (`fact_pulses_major`.`chickpea_yield_kg_per_ha` > 448.34 OR `fact_pulses_major`.`pigeonpea_yield_kg_per_ha` > 784.31). Join `fact_pulses_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`.

question: १९७० साली कोणत्या जिल्ह्यांनी चण्यासाठी ४४८.३४ किलो/हेक्टर किंवा तूरसाठी ७८४.३१ किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त उत्पादन नोंदवले?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 448.34 OR T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 784.31)
evidence: Find `dim_geography`.`dist_name` for records where `dim_year`.`year` = 1970 and (`fact_pulses_major`.`chickpea_yield_kg_per_ha` > 448.34 or `fact_pulses_major`.`pigeonpea_yield_kg_per_ha` > 784.31). Join `fact_pulses_major` with `dim_year` on `year_id` and with `dim_geography` on `geography_id`.

question: १९७० साली चण्याचे उत्पादन ४०० किलो/हेक्टर किंवा तुरीचे उत्पादन ७०० किलो/हेक्टरपेक्षा जास्त नोंदवलेले जिल्हे वर्णक्रमानुसार सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING MAX(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 400.0 OR MAX(T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 700.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter records where `dim_year`.`year` = 1970 and (`fact_pulses_major`.`chickpea_yield_kg_per_ha` > 400 or `fact_pulses_major`.`pigeonpea_yield_kg_per_ha` > 700). Then select `dim_geography`.`dist_name` and order alphabetically.

question: छत्तीसगढमधील विविध जिल्ह्यांतील मूगफळी व सोयाबीन या पिकांच्या क्षेत्र व उत्पादनाची वार्षिक माहिती, कालक्रमानुसार क्रमवारीत प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA, T1.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.SOYABEAN_AREA_1000HA, T1.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T3.YEAR
evidence: Filter `dim_geography.state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh'. Select `dim_geography.dist_name`, `dim_year.year`, `fact_oilseeds_major.groundnut_area_1000ha`, `fact_oilseeds_major.groundnut_production_1000tons`, `fact_oilseeds_major.soyabean_area_1000ha`, `fact_oilseeds_major.soyabean_production_1000tons`. Join `fact_oilseeds_major` with `dim_geography` on `geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `year_id`. Order by `dim_year.year` ASC.

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्ह्यांसाठी, विशेषतः ज्या वर्षांत खरोखरच मूगशेंगा पिकवली गेली होती त्या वर्षांसाठी, मूगशेंगा आणि सोयाबीनच्या लागवड क्षेत्र आणि उत्पादनाची एकूण वार्षिक तपशीलवार माहिती सर्वात अलीकडील ते जुन्या क्रमाने प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), SUM(T1.SOYABEAN_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T1.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA) > 0.0 ORDER BY T3.YEAR DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_geography`.`state_name` = 'Chhattisgarh'. Join `dim_geography`, `dim_year`, and `fact_oilseeds_major`. Select `dim_geography`.`dist_name`, `dim_year`.`year`, `fact_oilseeds_major`.`groundnut_area_1000ha`, `fact_oilseeds_major`.`groundnut_production_1000tons`, `fact_oilseeds_major`.`soyabean_area_1000ha`, `fact_oilseeds_major`.`soyabean_production_1000tons`. Filter where `fact_oilseeds_major`.`groundnut_area_1000ha` > 0. Order by `dim_year`.`year` DESC, `dim_geography`.`dist_name` ASC.

question: १९६६ ते १९७० या कालावधीत सोयाबीन आणि शेंगदाण्यांची राज्यनिहाय सरासरी उत्पादने प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME
evidence: Filter `dim_year`.`year` between 1966 and 1970 inclusive. Join `fact_oilseeds_major` with `dim_geography` on `fact_oilseeds_major`.`geography_id` = `dim_geography`.`geography_id` and with `dim_year` on `fact_oilseeds_major`.`year_id` = `dim_year`.`year_id`. Group by `dim_geography`.`state_name`. For each state, compute AVG(`fact_oilseeds_major`.`soyabean_production_1000tons`) and AVG(`fact_oilseeds_major`.`groundnut_production_1000tons`). Return state name and the two averages.
